hook: AI gave you a 9-step framework when you just needed a yes or a no.
caption:
AI gave you a 9-step framework when you just needed a yes or a no.

This is the #1 sign AI doesn't know how you think.

Some people process decisions by building structured frameworks. Others just need someone to cut through the noise and give them a direct answer they can pressure-test.

Neither is wrong. But when AI defaults to one style regardless of who's asking — that's when it feels useless.

The Decisive Thinker doesn't want a pros-and-cons list. They want a recommendation, fast, with the single most important caveat attached.

The Systematic Thinker? They'll actually read all nine steps. They want the framework. They're frustrated when AI skips it.

Right now, AI is guessing which one you are. And it's guessing wrong about half the time.

That's the problem bootfile.ai was built to fix — a profile that tells AI exactly how your brain prefers to receive information, so every response feels like it was written *for you*.

Not a template. Not a default. You.

Which one are you — do you want the framework, or just tell me what to do?
